content:
守密人，
    为保证大家的信息、资产安全，和公平的游戏环境，《忘却前夜》运营团队将在2.4.0版本更新后，持续进行针对使用脚本、外挂、漏洞、非法交易等方式产生不当获利之账号的打击和处理。（如：使用脚本刷取奖励的初始号/自抽号。）对于检测到近期发生以上行为之账号，鉴于其为游戏公平环境带来的严重影响，我们将对其进行永久封禁的处罚。
    针对购买到此类危险账号，并进行过充值，导致发生损失的守密人，我们将会为您提供订单转移服务：您可以使用被封禁的账号联系客服，并按照要求提供您的充值订单截图等信息。我们会协助守密人将正常发生的订单，转移到您提供的新账号中。（该新账号的创建时间必须在您与客服反馈之后。）

    在此我们再次呼吁守密人，为保护您的账号和资产安全，请勿参与账号交易，并妥善保管自己的账号信息。

**[11/16] Script/Hack Account Handling Instructions**

Keeper,
To ensure the safety of everyone's information and assets, as well as a fair gaming environment, the "Morimens" operation team will continue to crack down on accounts that improperly profit from using scripts, cheats, exploits, and illegal transactions after the 2.4.0 version update. (For example: initial accounts or self-draw accounts that use scripts to farm rewards.) For accounts detected to have engaged in the above behaviors recently, due to the serious impact on the fairness of the game environment, we will impose a permanent ban as a penalty.
For Keepers who have purchased such dangerous accounts and have made top-ups resulting in losses, we will provide order transfer services: You can contact customer service using the banned account and provide screenshots of your top-up orders and other required information as instructed. We will assist Keepers in transferring valid orders to the new account you provide. (The creation time of the new account must be after your feedback to customer service.)

We once again call on the Keepers to protect your account and asset security. Please do not engage in account trading and safeguard your account information properly.
